item.description:
• Talking-head video — turn a portrait + a voice clip into a lip-synced talking video. In the Audio studio, right-click a clip → “Make a talking video…”, pick a face, and your persona speaks. Pairs perfectly with the Turkish/German voice. (Uses your fal.ai key.)
  • Send a photo “To Video” — any generated image now has a one-tap handoff into the Video studio as the image-to-video start frame, no file picker.
  • Multi-size social export — reframe a clip to Reels/TikTok 9:16, Square 1:1 and Portrait 4:5 in one click, subject kept centered.
  • Save your full setup — “Save as case” now captures the whole recipe (model, steps, guidance, negative prompt, size and LoRAs), so a saved look reproduces exactly.
  • Fixes & reliability — the Turkish/German voice setup can no longer get stuck half-installed; long downloads no longer time out on the app side; filler-word removal is honest about non-English clips; the auto face detailer no longer slows big group shots; the video player closes with Esc; and a batch of smaller polish.
